articles.author: Kara Fox, Eugenia Yosef, Tami Luhby, Laura Sharman, Gawon Bae, Zachary Cohen, Isaac Yee, Eleni Giokos, Thomas Bordeaux, Tamara Qiblawi, Gianluca Mezzofiore, Elise Hammond, Michael Williams, Adam Cancryn, Sophie Tanno, Oren Liebermann, Tim Lister, Isobel Yeung, Catherine Nicholls, Auzinea Bacon, Joseph Ataman, Brice Lane, Sarah Dadouch
articles.title: Iranian regime's grip on Strait of Hormuz "degraded," US military says - CNN
articles.description: Ballistic missiles were fired toward the joint US-UK Diego Garcia military base on an island in the Indian Ocean, around 2,370 miles from Iran’s coast. Follow for live news updates.
articles.content:
Yesterday morning, Iran launched two intermediate-range ballistic missiles at a joint US-UK military base on the island of Diego Garcia, a US official told CNN.
Diego Garcia is part of the Chagos Is… [+1502 chars]
